productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Desiree Green Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen round neck top made of 100% cotton, with mosaic chest print on the front, short sleeves with gathered sides and embroidered branding on the chestFittingRegular15 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this green tee from Levi's. The mosaic random print on the chest fills this tee with the spirit of wonder and happiness. Team this with small white skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
